entries.title: Always include Plan Metadata in summaries
entries.description:
# Always include Plan Metadata in summaries

## Context

When presenting plan summaries to users after salvador_plan iterations

## Pattern

Every plan summary MUST include a Plan Metadata table at the top with: Plan ID, Check ID, Grade (score/100), Status, and Expiration time

## Example

```typescript
| Field | Value |\n|-------|-------|\n| **Plan ID** | 1770027538557_5cfbd0ba |\n| **Check ID** | chk_plan_1770027538557_5cfbd0ba |\n| **Grade** | A+ (95/100) |\n| **Status** | READY_FOR_APPROVAL |\n| **Expires** | 30 minutes from creation |
```

## Why

Without visible IDs, users cannot: (1) Resume plans after interruption, (2) Reference plans in future sessions, (3) Approve plans for task generation. The _checkId is the key to all plan operations.

entries.title: Show preview of changes BEFORE asking for confirmation
Asking for confirmation without showing what will change
entries.description:
# Asking for confirmation without showing what will change

## Context

Interactive yes/no prompts that don't show the affected items

## Anti-Pattern

Prompting 'Clean up duplicates? [y/N]' without first listing which files will be deleted forces users to guess or abort.

## Example (Bad)

```typescript
// BAD:
const confirmed = await askQuestion('Clean up? [y/N] ');
if (confirmed) deleteFiles(analysis.duplicates);
```

## Why It's Wrong

Users don't know what they're agreeing to. They either abort (friction) or blindly confirm (risk). Preview eliminates both problems.

## Correct Approach

See: [preview-before-confirmation](../../patterns/other/preview-before-confirmation.md)
